description_long: This is a compact, heavily armored military vehicle with a squat, angular body and a prominent, short-barreled cannon mounted on the front-facing turret. The vehicle features thick, riveted armor plating covering all sides, with visible bolts and reinforced panels, giving it a robust and durable appearance. It is equipped with two large, treaded tracks on either side, each supported by two large wheels, designed for traversing rough urban terrain. The turret is boxy and slightly sloped, with a circular hatch and a radio antenna extending from the top, suggesting communication capabilities. The exterior is painted in a matte olive green, with subtle weathering and wear, and faint white star insignias on the front armor. The vehicle's design is utilitarian, prioritizing protection and firepower for urban combat scenarios.
description: A compact, heavily armored military vehicle with a short-barreled cannon, thick green armor, and large treaded tracks. It features a boxy turret, antenna, and faint white star markings.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the back armor plating, radio antenna, and rear access panel.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the treaded tracks, large wheels, and side armor panels.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the short-barreled cannon, sloped turret, and white star insignias on the armor.
description_view_3: Right side view with visible wheels, tracks, and a circular hatch on the turret.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One large cannon mounted centrally on the front turret; no other weapon mounts visible.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with thick, riveted steel armor plating; sloped and reinforced panels on turret and hull.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Solid matte olive green paint with weathering; no distinct camouflage pattern.
attribute_military_markings: Faint white star insignias on the front armor; no other visible markings.
